hero.mindset_description: It is your mind that needs convincing. Push past your limits, stay committed, and watch your body transform into a powerhouse of strength.

about.subtitle: About Us
about.description: We believe Fitness is more than just a workout—it's a lifestyle. With top-of-the-line facilities, certified trainers, and a supportive community, we're here to inspire and guide you every step of the way.

features.personal_trainer_desc: Achieve your fitness goals with the guidance of our certified trainers.
features.cardio_programs_desc: From steady-state runs to interval sprints, our treadmill programs.
features.quality_equipment_desc: Our gym is equipped with the latest cardio & strength machines.
features.healthy_nutritions_desc: Fuel your fitness journey with customized meal plans for you.

why_us.ttl: Elevate fitness with the best way possible
why_us.sub: We offer a fitness journey that's tailored to your goals, supported by professional trainers and a welcoming community. Whether it's weight loss, strength building, or overall wellness, our proven methods.
why_us.d1: We tailor every workout to fit your unique goals and fitness level ensuring that you make the most progress.
why_us.d2: Everything we do is designed to help you achieve measurable results, whether you're aiming for weight loss.
why_us.d3: We provide the latest in gym equipment, from cardio machines to free , weights, designed to support every type.

logout.sure: Are you sure you want to log out?

footer.slogan: Push Harder, Go Further. Your Fitness Journey Starts Today!
